notes: L27 Part 2 (act 160) 'Palindrome Partitioning — backtracking + palindrome DP', 82.5s, 8 cues. Reuses backtracking.py (three_beats/snapshot_chip/complexity) + bayes.chip + inline dp grid/tree; NOT transformer scenes. MathTex only for O(n·2^n) and n=16→≤2^15≈32K. s=aab → partitions [a,a,b] and [aa,b]; dp table verified (dp[0][1]=T aa, dp[1][2]=F ab, dp[0][2]=F aab, diagonal T). READ start/mid/end each cue (tail cue07 no _end). Round-1 iteration fixed Cue06 concat-overshoot (0.667s TOO LONG → tightened family-chip pacing to fit 12.4s window). All legible/in-frame/on-brand.
